column1: # Provenance: 22 obligation-year ROC-price rows transcribed from Ofgem annual-report XLSX companions.
# Buyout + recycle + e-ROC clearing + mutualisation totals per obligation year
# Primary discovery URL:
#   https://www.ofgem.gov.uk/renewables-obligation-ro/contacts-guidance-and-resources/public-reports-and-data-ro
# Sources (D-03 multi-source sidecar — full sha256 + retrieved_on in sibling .meta.json sources[] array):
# SY9-SY22 (2010-11 to 2023-24): EXACT values extracted from
#   Figure A4.1 "Determination of ROC recycle value since SY9"
#   in Ofgem RO Annual Report SY22 dataset companion XLSX
#   (data/raw/ofgem/ro_annual_report_sy22_dataset.xlsx)
#   Columns used: "Recycle value per ROC presented" (= recycle_gbp_per_roc)
#                 "Worth of a ROC to a supplier" (= buyout + recycle)
#   buyout_gbp_per_roc = worth - recycle (derived
# SY23 row (2024-25) also confirmed from SY23 companion XLSX Figure A4.1 but
#   is OUTSIDE the 22-year span (OY 2002-03 to 2023-24) and not included here.
# SY5-SY8 (2006-07 to 2009-10): DERIVED from
#   - Redistribution amounts: SY18 XLSX "4. Supplier Compliance" Table 4.5
#   - Annual ROC issue totals: 12-year XLSX "ROCs by Tech & Country" annual sections
#   recycle_gbp_per_roc = total_redistributed / total_rocs_issued
#   (ROCs issued ≈ ROCs presented; SY9 cross-check confirms <0.1% drift)
#   Statutory buyout prices from UK SI instruments (SI 2006/3270
# SY1-SY4 (2002-03 to 2005-06): ESTIMATED from
#   - Redistribution amounts: SY18 XLSX Table 4.5 (Figure 4.4)
#   - Scheme values: SY18 XLSX Figure 4.5
#   Formula: recycle = redistributed * buyout / (scheme_value - redistributed)
#   (Algebraic inversion of: scheme_value = rocs_presented * (buyout + recycle))
#   Statutory buyout prices from UK SI instruments (SI 2002/914
# D-11: mutualisation_gbp_total is non-zero ONLY for SY20 (2021-22) — one-off ROC
#   supplier-default event. Amount = RO + ROS combined per SY22 XLSX Figures A3.3 + A3.4.
#   All other obligation years carry mutualisation_gbp_total=0.
# eroc_gbp_per_roc: e-ROC clearing price from quarterly e-ROC auctions (www.e-roc.co.uk).
#   e-ROC auctions commenced SY9 (2010-11). No e-ROC market before that.
#   Current status: e-ROC clearing price transcription is DEFERRED (see roc-prices.csv.meta.json
#   notes field). All rows carry eroc_gbp_per_roc=None (null) for now.
#   The pipeline falls back to (buyout + recycle) when eroc is null — see cost_model.py.
# REF Constable 2025 Table 1 (tests/fixtures/benchmarks.yaml::ref_constable) is the
# cross-check anchor — scheme values must reconcile within ±3% per scheme year (D-14).
# DIVERGENCE.md gates this test while Option-D stubs remain active.
# Schema (pinned in src/uk_subsidy_tracker/data/roc_prices.py::roc_prices_schema and
#   src/uk_subsidy_tracker/data/ofgem_aggregate.py::ofgem_roc_prices_schema):
#   obligation_year        : ^\d{4}-\d{2}$ (e.g. 2022-23)
#   buyout_gbp_per_roc     : float64 — statutory buy-out price (£/ROC)
#   recycle_gbp_per_roc    : float64 — recycle value (redistributed fund / ROCs presented
#   eroc_gbp_per_roc       : float64 nullable — e-ROC clearing price (£/ROC); null = not yet transcribed
#   mutualisation_gbp_total: float64 nullable — total mutualisation payment (GBP
obligation_year
